name: 10L QAT + SwiGLU + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(frac=0.4) + WD=0.04
blurb: 10 layers with QAT (int5 MLP / int6 attn via STE), SwiGLU activation, BigramHash 10240 buckets, SmearGate, SWA start_frac=0.4, WD=0.04 global, warmdown=3000. Mixed int5/int6+zstd-22 quantization. OrthoInit + muP-scaled projections.
author: chirag-bajaj
